title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository – the easiest way to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other open-source LLMs locally with a single CLI or REST API.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, giving any LangChain chain/agent the ability to call locally-hosted Ollama models with streaming, JSON-mode, etc.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official lightweight Python client for Ollama. Async + sync APIs, streaming, embeddings, chat and generate endpoints.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers. Supports streaming, embeddings, and chat in both ESM and CommonJS.

title: ollama-webui
summary: A ChatGPT-like web UI that plugs into any Ollama instance. Markdown, code highlighting, multi-model chats, RAG via document upload.

title: continue / continue
summary: Open-source VS Code & JetBrains extension that brings Ollama-powered autocomplete and chat into your IDE.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Retrieval-Augmented Generation example using Ollama, LangChain and Chroma for PDF ingestion and local Q&A.

title: chainlit + Ollama cookbook
summary: Official Chainlit recipe showing how to build a chatbot UI backed by any Ollama model in <30 lines of code.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that replaces GitHub Copilot with a locally-running Ollama model for code suggestions.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Next.js chat interface styled like ChatGPT that connects to your local Ollama API with streaming, markdown and mobile support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI wrapper for Ollama adding prompt templates, conversation history, and shell piping.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & persistent volume support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama built with Retrofit. Supports streaming, chat, embeddings and model management.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Simple Electron desktop app for chatting with Ollama offline; cross-platform installers included.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama, Nginx reverse-proxy, and optional WebUI with HTTPS.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async-first Rust crate for interacting with the Ollama API; includes chat, generate, embeddings and model ops.

title: ollama-codellama-vscode
summary: Lightweight VS Code extension that uses Ollama + Code Llama for inline code completion and explanations.
